arts.ttl: Italian Football Podcast: Inter and Atalanta make up ground on Napoli
arts.sum: Serie A Matchday 24 was a big one at the top of the table, with Inter and Atalanta both picking up points whilst Napoli surprisingly drew at home against Udinese. Euan Burns is joined by Kev Pogorzelski and Ben Dixon for the latest edition of the Total Italian Football Podcast. The post Italian Football Podcast: Inter and Atalanta make up ground on Napoli appeared first on Total Italian Football.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge set to welcome back old favourite in Champions League clash with Atalanta
arts.sum: Club Brugge are braced to welcome back an old favourite to the Jan Breydel on Wednesday evening. The Belgian side will put on a welcome for their former academy product…

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Attacking Crisis: Gasperini’s Limited Options from Lookman to Maldini and Scamacca
arts.sum: Atalanta's dream of challenging for the Scudetto has been hampered by an injury crisis that has decimated their once-deep squad. What began as a defensive issue has now spread to the attack, leaving manager Gian Piero Gasperini with limited options in a crucial phase of the season. The post Atalanta’s Attacking Crisis: Gasperini’s Limited Options from Lookman to Maldini and Scamacca appeared first on FootItalia.com.
